response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio is entirely instrumental background music, confirming the reference JSON's assessment of no vocal music. 2. JSON Usage: Reference JSON was used to determine scene transitions and confirm the absence of spoken dialogue. Subtitles are generated manually based on prominent on-screen announcement text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are triggered by Visual Events (On-Screen Text Exception) and timed to the display duration of each announcement slide.
